name: Bors
description: Sir Bors the Younger is one of the best and most virtuous knights of the Round Table in Arthurian legend. He is the son of King Bors the Elder and nephew of King Ban of Benwick, making him a cousin of Sir Lancelot. Bors is renowned for his purity, unwavering loyalty, and exceptional fighting skills. He is one of the three knights, along with Galahad and Percival, who achieve the Holy Grail. His unyielding faith and commitment to chastity are crucial to his success in the Grail quest. After witnessing the Grail, Bors returns to Camelot and recounts his experiences to King Arthur and the other knights. He remains a loyal supporter of Arthur and Lancelot, even during the tumultuous events that lead to the fall of Camelot. Bors is one of the few surviving knights after the final battle of Camlann, and he plays a key role in preserving the memory of Arthur's kingdom and the ideals of chivalry. He ultimately embarks on a pilgrimage to the Holy Land, continuing his spiritual journey after the passing of Arthur.
subtitle: The Pure Knight of the Round Table
achievements: Remaining chaste during the Grail Quest
Remaining loyal to Arthur and Lancelot

keyMyths.title: The Grail Quest
keyMyths.description: Bors, along with Galahad and Percival, embarks on the quest for the Holy Grail. His purity and faith allow him to witness the Grail's mysteries and return to Camelot.

keyMyths.title: The Choice of Maidens
keyMyths.description: During the Grail Quest, Bors is faced with a moral dilemma where he must choose between saving a maiden or his brother. He chooses to save the maiden, proving his commitment to chivalry.

keyMyths.title: Loyalty to Lancelot
keyMyths.description: Even after Lancelot's affair with Guinevere is revealed, Bors remains loyal to his cousin, showcasing his unwavering commitment to family and friendship.

sources.author: Sir Thomas Malory
sources.description: A comprehensive compilation of Arthurian legends, featuring Bors as a key character.
sources.text: A comprehensive compilation of Arthurian legends, featuring Bors as a key character.
